tasks.subject: Task 0: Database Schema & TypeScript Types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `user_onboarding` table in Supabase and add TypeScript types.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`
- Run SQL in Supabase dashboard

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- user_onboarding table exists with user_id PK and 6 boolean columns
- TypeScript types added for Row, Insert, Update
- RLS policy: users read/write own row only

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/integrations/supabase/types.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["user_onboarding table exists", "TypeScript types added", "RLS policy set"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: useToolOnboardingStatus Hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create hook that queries user_onboarding table and returns per-tool completion status.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useToolOnboardingStatus.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Returns statuses Record with all 6 tool keys
- Returns loading boolean
- Exposes markToolCompleted(toolKey) function
- No row = all false

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useToolOnboardingStatus.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns per-tool status", "markToolCompleted upserts row", "Handles no-row case"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Tool Walkthrough Config & Extended Step Type
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create static config file with all 6 tool walkthrough definitions and extended step type.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/config/toolWalkthroughConfig.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ToolWalkthroughStep type with skipIfMissing
- All 6 tool configs defined
- Steps with skipIfMissing set on empty-state targets

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/config/toolWalkthroughConfig.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 6 tool configs defined", "skipIfMissing set on empty-state steps", "Types exported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ToolIntroModal & ToolHelpButton Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build intro modal overlay and help/replay button.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/walkthrough/ToolIntroModal.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/walkthrough/ToolHelpButton.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ToolIntroModal shows icon, title, description, Start Tour and Skip
- ToolHelpButton renders HelpCircle with tooltip

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/walkthrough/ToolIntroModal.tsx", "src/components/walkthrough/ToolHelpButton.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Modal renders with config props", "Help button triggers replay"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: useToolWalkthrough Hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create orchestration hook managing modal -> spotlight -> done with skipIfMissing and onBeforeStep.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useToolWalkthrough.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Manages phase: idle | modal | spotlight | done
- Auto-starts when completed === false
- skipIfMissing skips absent targets
- onBeforeStep callback called before each step
- replay mode no DB write

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useToolWalkthrough.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Phase management works", "skipIfMissing skips absent targets", "onBeforeStep callback called", "replay mode no DB write"]}
```
